R

RADAR - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Metallic light color for rotating radar dishes and sensor domes.
receiveShot() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Cell
Processes an incoming shot directed at this cell.
registerHit() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Ship
Checks if all cells occupied by this ship have been hit.
registerResult(Coordinate, CellState) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.HuntTargetStrategy
Registers shot outcomes to update strategy intelligence and state.
registerResult(Coordinate, CellState) - Method in interface com.example.battleship.model.IShootingStrategy
Registers the outcome of a fired shot to update the internal targeting state or strategy.
registerShotResult(Coordinate, CellState) - Method in interface com.example.battleship.model.players.IPlayer
Registers the outcome of a fired shot to update the player's internal state or strategy.
registerShotResult(Coordinate, CellState) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.players.MachinePlayer
Registers the outcome of a fired shot to update the AI's shooting strategy state.
registerShotResult(Coordinate, CellState) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.players.Player
Registers the result of a shot to update internal state or strategy.
removeListener(BoardListener) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Board
Removes a registered listener from this board.
RepeatedShotException - Exception in com.example.battleship.model.exceptions
Exception thrown when a player attempts to shoot at a coordinate that has already been targeted.
RepeatedShotException(String, CellState) - Constructor for exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.RepeatedShotException
Constructs a new RepeatedShotException with a descriptive message and the state of the previously targeted cell.
requireGameManager() - Method in class com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
Ensures an active game manager instance exists, creating a new default one if necessary.
reset() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.HuntTargetStrategy
Resets strategy internal history and reverts to standard HUNT mode.
reset() - Method in interface com.example.battleship.model.IShootingStrategy
Resets the strategy state, clearing shot history and targeted memory.
restoreTransientState() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Board
Restores the transient listeners list after deserialization.
RUNWAY - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Dark asphalt color for aircraft carrier flight decks and landing strips.
RUNWAY_LINE - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Bright white paint color for runway centerlines and touchdown markers.
